config.#: MAQAO ONE View config -- UPSTREAM CP2K MASTER (profiling baseline)
Parallel : 16 MPI ranks x 1 OpenMP thread, one Peta4 Ice Lake node
Driven by: run_maqao_profile_slurm.sh   (all paths absolute, CSD3)
JSON note: the key "#" is treated as a comment by MAQAO's parser.
config.comments: Upstream CP2K master, pure-MPI NNP code path. Baseline for the feature/nnp-native-spline comparison report.
config.#: Binary already carries -g debug info -> MAQAO maps hot loops back to
Shared, self-contained dataset (run.inp + NNP committee data); built
by the SLURM driver before MAQAO is invoked. Linked into the xp dir.
Statically analyse the 15 hottest loops -- enough to cover the whole
